commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/00-namespace.yaml /tmp/00-ns.yaml && kubectl --context ohio apply -f /tmp/00-ns.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get ns efa-validation -o wide && kubectl --context ohio get sa -n efa-validation'
